problem_statement: MAF runtime binding is the next F8 substrate-disconnect thread, but executable binding cannot start until UAO admission, implementation design, rollback evidence, runtime execution receipts, CI Rust backend evidence, and terminal closure review are explicit.
success_criteria: MafRuntimeBindingAdmissionWitness validates against a public JSON schema and Foundation Mode example
MafRuntimeBindingAdmissionWitness binds the closed MAF static prerequisite witness refs and the F8 scoping plan
MafRuntimeBindingAdmissionWitness records runtime binding admission while keeping solver outcome AwaitingEvidence
MafRuntimeBindingAdmissionWitness requires UAO admission, implementation design, rollback recovery, runtime execution receipts, CI Rust backend lane, and terminal closure review before implementation

MafRuntimeBindingAdmissionWitness blocks implementation start, runtime binding, PyO3 binding, subprocess execution, CLI execution, Rust crate execution, Python Rust imports, CI backend default flip, secret access, writes, runtime dispatch, canonical state mutation, terminal closure, and success claims

MafRuntimeBindingAdmissionWitness rejects authority drift, scope drift, required evidence drift, admission requirement drift, source digest drift, secret markers, receipt ref drift, and summary count drift
constraints: runtime_binding_claimed, implementation_authority_claimed, and terminal_closure_claimed remain false
each source artifact digest must match repository-local source files
each admission requirement must remain blocked_until_evidence
